summary: Test suite validates CI/CD workflow infrastructure (linting, action references, permissions) but has significant gaps in functional coverage. Only 3 act-driven tests cover the script's core logic (approved/denied/unknown licenses), all using package.json. Missing: requirements.txt parsing tests, error scenarios (missing files, malformed JSON, permission errors), edge cases (empty dependencies, special characters, whitespace), and mixed compliance statuses. Assertions rely on loose grep patterns rather than precise output validation. Fixtures are assumed to exist rather than created/validated by tests. Would miss many real bugs in the script's license checking logic.
